articles.title: Big Pharma's War on Turmeric: Anti-Inflammatory Superfoods Suppressed Because They Can't Be Patented
articles.summary: The medical-pharmaceutical complex systematically suppresses turmeric and other anti-inflammatory superfoods despite their proven efficacy targeting multiple disease pathways. The reason is simple: curcuminoids can't be patented for massive profits, so natural alternatives are dismissed while synthetic drugs dominate treatment protocols.

articles.title: The Hemp Conspiracy: How DuPont and Big Pharma Destroyed Your Natural Medicine Cabinet in 1937
articles.summary: Hemp was systematically outlawed not for health concerns but because synthetic fiber corporations like DuPont saw it as competition. The 1970 Controlled Substances Act falsely classified hemp as Schedule I with 'no accepted medical use,' burying decades of therapeutic potential to protect corporate profits.

articles.title: Ozempic's Hidden Muscle Destruction: New Study Exposes What Pharma Won't Tell You
articles.summary: While Ozempic rakes in billions as a weight-loss miracle drug, new research reveals serious muscle health consequences that the pharmaceutical industry downplays. Semaglutide's effects on muscle mass and metabolism go far beyond the sanitized marketing narrative pushed by Novo Nordisk.

articles.title: Senator Ron Johnson Exposes FDA's COVID Vaccine Cover-Up: 'Largest Government Scandal in My Lifetime'

This fundamental conflict between profit and patient wellbeing drives systematic overtreatment while suppressing evidence that simpler approaches work better.

articles.title: Neuroimaging's Replication Crisis: External Validation Reveals Widespread Study Failures
articles.summary: New research in Nature exposes the replication crisis plaguing neuroimaging studies, showing that external validation using independent datasets is essential but routinely ignored. This methodological failure has led to countless irreproducible findings that waste resources and mislead clinical practice.
